howItWorks.intro: This 3d print layer height calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Layer Height
rules.explanation: Fraction of nozzle diameter based on desired quality.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What layer height should I use?
faq.a: 25-75% of nozzle diameter. 0.2mm is standard for a 0.4mm nozzle.
Thicker layers bond better but show more visible lines.
